self.rule: This file routes authority and proof classes; it does not duplicate transient workflow conclusions.

exact_status.transient_acceptance: GitHub Actions and retained release records
exact_status.pull_request_record: the current cumulative integration pull request

proof_classes.P0: representation calculation, score, embedding, diffusion, mode, or simulation
proof_classes.P1: machine-verified property of an explicit formal model, including valid eigenstructure
proof_classes.P4: external, deployment, pilot, or production acceptance
proof_classes.correspondence_rule: No class silently promotes itself. A P1 certificate may satisfy a software gate only when verified P2 correspondence makes that implication sound.

representation_policy.retention_rule: Artifacts expose generator, digests, dimensions, provenance, assumptions, transformations, parameters, validation, proof class, excluded claims, and compact language bridge.

current_trace_roles.trace007: commercial/effect production transaction and computation baseline
current_trace_roles.trace008: release, recovery, and capacity implementation compression
current_trace_roles.trace009: UI projection architecture search and calibration
current_trace_roles.trace011: employee UI port and presentation adapters
current_trace_roles.trace012: UI Lab and folder-first UI variant standard
